creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
As per the discussions in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220818 and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=220438, this port is now the only version of oniguruma that is maintained and depended upon by other ports.

Tickets to delete the remaining ports are https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222867 for oniguruma4 and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=222868 for oniguruma5.
